name: Honey-Orange Pecan Sourdough Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in water; stir in milk, batter, butter, honey, and salt.
2. Gradually mix in 3 cups of the flour; the dough will be sticky.
3. Turn dough into a greased bowl, turning it over to grease the top; cover, and let rise in a warm place until double in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours.
4. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured board and knead until smooth, about 5 minutes. Add flour if necessary to prevent the dough from sticking.
5. Roll dough into a 12x15 inch rectangle; spread orange-nut filling evenly over dough.
6. Starting with the long side, roll up in a jelly-roll fashion.
7. Cut across the roll into 15 slices about 1 inch each and arrange, cut-side-up, in a well-greased 9 by 13 inch baking pan.
8. Cover and let rise until almost double, about 45 minutes.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 35 minutes or until browned on top.
10. Transfer rolls to a serving board; quickly scrape out any syrup from the pan and spread it over the rolls.
11. Serve them warm or reheated in a 350°F oven, lightly covered with foil, for about 20 minutes.
12. Makes 15 rolls.
